catalog.reason: Catalog/package parity is blocked because dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md disagree on skill and risk counts, and the CI-backed catalog refresh path exists but cannot be dispatched through the currently exposed GitHub connector action set.
catalog.action: Manually execute the catalog refresh workflow or run npm run build:catalog from a checked-out repository, then verify dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, dist/install-manifest.json, and reports agree before Packager or Publisher endorsement.
catalog.blocked_by: GitHub connector exposes workflow inspection/rerun tools but no workflow_dispatch/start action for catalog-refresh.yml in this run.
